last_prompt: Based on the research documented in docs/research-notes.md (including findings on gastown and openclaw), create a prioritized roadmap of new features and improvements for wreck-it. Add new task entries to dogfood-tasks.json (as additional tasks in phase 4 or higher with appropriate depends_on referencing existing eval tasks) for each proposed improvement. Focus on features that would make wreck-it a breakthrough tool: dynamic task generation by agents, inter-agent communication, intelligent task routing based on agent specialization, self-improving loop strategies, and integration opportunities with gastown and openclaw.
